source: LoCoMo held-out cases for PRISM-Memory release

scenarios.title: Temporal Anchor
scenarios.question: Which hobby did Sam take up in May 2023?
scenarios.note: The released model keeps the dated hobby proposition and answers correctly.

scenarios.title: Adversarial Refusal
scenarios.question: Why did Dave get his guitar customized with a shiny finish?
scenarios.note: This tests whether the system refuses to invent an answer when the premise is unsupported.

scenarios.title: Diagnosis Specificity
scenarios.question: Which ailment does Sam have to face due to his weight?
scenarios.note: A representative factual miss: the model retrieves the health-risk frame but not the specific diagnosis.

scenarios.title: Location Inference
scenarios.question: Does Evan live close to a beach or mountains?
scenarios.note: A representative inferential miss: retrieval includes both clues, but the model overcommits to the mountain mention.

scenarios.title: Reading Detail
scenarios.question: What novel is Evan reading that he finds gripping?
scenarios.note: A representative multi-hop miss: the model retains the coarse book description but misses the specific title.
